title: Lead Investment Banker at National Insurance

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at National Insurance
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, National Insurance in Ahmedabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About National Insurance:
National Insurance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with National Insurance!
